nasb.text: And now, behold, bound by the Spirit, I am on my way to Jerusalem, not knowing what will happen to me there,

esv.text: And now, behold, I am going to Jerusalem, constrained by the Spirit, not knowing what will happen to me there,

cnv.text: 現在，我的心靈受到催逼，要去耶路撒冷，我不知道在那裡會遭遇甚麼事，

ccb.text: 现在，我在圣灵的催促下去耶路撒冷，不知道在那里会发生什么事，

csbs.text: “看，现在我灵里受到催逼，要去耶路撒冷。我不知道在那里将会遇到什么事，
